conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours make better decisions with their data. I saw that you're using SurveyMonkey, and I thought our solution could be a great fit to help you gain even more insights from your survey data.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, SurveyMonkey. Yeah, we do use that. But I'm not sure what you mean by "gain more insights". We're already getting the data we need from SurveyMonkey. What makes your solution so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our AI-powered engine can help you process and analyze large amounts of data in real-time, giving you a more complete picture of your customers and employees. We've seen companies like yours increase their survey response rates by up to 30% and reduce their data analysis time by up to 50%.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but I'm not sure if we're ready to invest in another data solution right now. We just implemented a new CRM system and we're still getting used to that. Plus, I'm not sure if our team has the bandwidth to take on another project.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. Implementing a new system can be a big undertaking. But our solution is actually designed to be pretty lightweight and easy to integrate. We have pre-built integrations with many popular CRM systems, including the one you just implemented. And our pricing is very competitive, starting at just $5,000 per year.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: $5,000 per year is actually a bit steep for us. We're a smaller company and we have to be careful with our budget. And even if we were interested, I'm not sure if we have the authority to make a purchase like that without checking with our CEO and other stakeholders.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget can be a concern. But I'd like to offer you a free trial to see the value that our solution can bring to your company. And if you're interested, we can also provide a custom quote that fits your specific needs. Would you be open to discussing this further with your team and seeing if it's something that might be a good fit?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Look, I appreciate the offer, but I really don't think this is something we're going to be able to move forward with. We've got a lot on our plate right now and I just don't see us being able to prioritize this. I'm going to have to decline, thanks for reaching out though.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's budget concerns and potentially offered more flexible pricing options earlier in the conversation to build momentum and overcome the objection. Sentiment: Neutral
